stages.editorComingSoon: Coming soon, follow us for updates

smartImport.title: Start Your Creative Journey
smartImport.subtitle: First, choose your creation method

manualCreate.title: Create from Episode 1
manualCreate.description: Start from episode 1, suitable for episodic creation or single short videos

smartImport.title: Smart Import Full Book
smartImport.description: Upload a complete novel or script, AI engine automatically recognizes chapter structure and splits into episodes.

upload.title: Upload Raw Material
upload.subtitle: AI engine is ready, automatic episode splitting and formatting
upload.placeholder: Paste your novel chapters or script content here...

analyzing.title: AI is Analyzing Your Story
analyzing.description: Recognizing chapter structure, smart splitting in progress...

deleteConfirm.title: Confirm Delete
deleteConfirm.message: Are you sure you want to delete "{title}"?

tip.title: Tip
tip.content: You can directly edit titles, summaries, and content. After clicking [Confirm Complete], episodes will be officially imported into the project

errors.fileTooLarge: File too large, please upload a file smaller than 10MB
errors.docNotSupported: .doc format not supported, please convert to .docx in Word
errors.fileReadError: File read failed, please try again
errors.uploadFirst: Please upload or paste content first

smartImport.cancelConfirm: Are you sure you want to cancel? Analyzed episodes will be cleared.

storyInput.editingTip: The following workflow is for this episode only. Switch episodes in the top left if needed

assetLibraryTip.title: Need custom characters and locations?
assetLibraryTip.description: Click the 「Asset Library」 button in the top right to upload asset setting documents or manually add characters/locations. AI will prioritize using settings from the asset library for analysis.

storyInput.videoRatioHint: Pick a ratio that matches your target platform and content format

ratioUsage.1_1: 1:1: Square frame, good for avatars, covers and generic social posts
ratioUsage.9_16: 9:16: Vertical video, ideal for TikTok, Reels, Shorts and other short‑video feeds
ratioUsage.16_9: 16:9: Horizontal video, ideal for YouTube, Bilibili and desktop playback
ratioUsage.4_3: 4:3: Classic TV ratio, useful for legacy footage or safe cropping
ratioUsage.3_4: 3:4: Slightly vertical, suitable for mixed text + video layouts
ratioUsage.2_3: 2:3: More vertical, good for posters and character key art
ratioUsage.3_2: 3:2: Slightly horizontal, good for landscapes and story scenes
ratioUsage.4_5: 4:5: Vertical poster ratio, common in social feed images
ratioUsage.5_4: 5:4: Horizontal poster ratio, suitable for PC web banners
ratioUsage.21_9: 21:9: Ultra‑wide cinematic frame, ideal for movie‑like shots and panoramas

storyInput.visualStyleHint: Pick a style that matches your audience — e.g. Realistic for live‑action, Anime for 2D content
storyInput.currentConfigSummary: Current config: {ratio} · {style}. All subsequent generations will use this combo.
storyInput.assetLibraryRatioNote: Asset library ratios are not affected
storyInput.moreConfig: For more configuration options, click the 「 Settings」 button in the top right

narration.title: Enable Narration Voiceover
narration.description: Generate TTS voice narration to add commentary to your video

storyInput.ready: ✓ Configuration complete, ready for next step

execution.requestAborted: Request aborted (possibly due to page refresh)
execution.taskStreamTimeout: Task timed out. The task may still be running in the background — please check its status or retry

storyToScript.title: Script Flow Will Be Rebuilt
storyToScript.message: Downstream storyboard data is detected for this episode ({storyboardCount} storyboards, {panelCount} panels). Continuing will clear and rebuild this data. Continue?

scriptToStoryboard.title: Storyboard Data Will Be Rebuilt
scriptToStoryboard.message: Existing storyboard data is detected for this episode ({storyboardCount} storyboards, {panelCount} panels). Continuing will clear current storyboards and regenerate them. Continue?
